questions.question: Describe the 'parking lot' model of deadlock detection, and explain how it handles a deadlock situation. (10 marks)
questions.hint: This model is used to detect deadlock situations

questions.question: What are the two main conditions necessary for a deadlock to occur in a system? (5 marks)
questions.hint: These conditions are mutual exclusion and hold and wait

questions.question: An operating system decides to prevent a deadlock situation by forcing a process to release a resource it is holding. What type of algorithm would the OS use to select the process to terminate? (10 marks)
questions.hint: The OS would use a Round Robin algorithm
